'''Dathomir lizards''' had [[Color/Legends|green]] skin that was used for leather garments. [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka]] wore Dathomir lizard skin leather. They would begin to fade and wear thin within one to two [[Standard year/Legends|years]].

{{Creature-stub}}
